title: Test Story
description: A minimal test story with one passage and two endings.
author: dev

choices.label: follow the fox
choices.hint: Branches scratch your arms as you push into the undergrowth.

choices.label: take the village path
choices.hint: The packed earth feels solid and safe under your boots.

ending.title: The Fox Escaped
ending.flavor: The fox disappeared into the forest and was never seen again.

ending.title: The Fox Remained
ending.flavor: The fox curled up beside the lazy dog and fell asleep.
